name: Swordsoul Sacred Summit
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>峰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>相</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Xiangjian Gate of the Great Spirit Summit
desc: Target 1 "Swordsoul" monster in your GY, or if you control a Synchro Monster, you can target 1 Wyrm monster instead; Special Summon it. If this card is banished: You can target 1 "Swordsoul" monster, or Wyrm monster, you control; increase or decrease its Level by 1 until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Swordsoul Sacred Summit" once per turn.
